text: Committee of Experts on International Cooperation in Tax MattersThirty-first sessionGeneva, 21–24 October 2025Provisional agenda1.Opening of the session by the representative of the Secretary-General. 2.Election of the Chair or Co-Chairs and Vice-Chairs of the Committee. 3.Remarks by the Chair or Co-Chairs of the Committee. 4.Adoption of the agenda. 5.Discussion of issues related to international cooperation in tax matters: (a)Taxation and the Sustainable Development Goals;(b)Issues related to the United Nations Model Tax Convention;(c)Review and possible update of the United Nations Manual for the Negotiation of Bilateral Tax Treaties between Developed and Developing Countries; (d)Procedural issues for the Committee; (e)Other areas for Committee consideration and guidance as part of its work programme.6.Provisional agenda of the thirty-second session. 7.Arrangements for adopting the report of the Committee on its thirty-first session.2669540304800
body: Committee of Experts on International Cooperation in Tax Matters
